name: Yuri Egin
alt_names: Yuri Frederick Egin (ユリ ・フレデリク・エギン)
description: Yuri Egin is the daughter of the Candial and Yukio and Rin's Mother.    ~!Yuri let herself voluntarily be possessed by Satan and give birth to his children to prove that humans and demons could live and love together. She died after she gave birth to Rin and Yukio. !~
